_meta.scope: repository (ORG/REPO) or all active repos in org (ORG only)
_meta.output_format: Combined JSON to stdout with three top-level arrays: pr_sessions, requests, developer_day_summary

pr_sessions.grain: one row per Copilot-authored pull request
pr_sessions.description: Lifecycle data for each PR session initiated by Copilot Coding Agent. Links back to the originating request (issue assignment or @copilot mention).

pr_draft.description: Whether the PR is a draft

pr_author_login.description: GitHub login of the PR author (typically copilot bot)

merged_by.description: GitHub login of the user who merged the PR

changes_requested_count.description: Number of changes_requested review events on the PR

reopened_count.description: Number of times the PR was reopened

additional_guidance_count.description: Number of follow-up @copilot comments on the PR after creation

session_issue_number.description: Issue number of the copilot-session summary issue, if found

origin_request_type.description: How Copilot was invoked for this PR

origin_issue_number.description: Issue number of the originating request

origin_requested_by.description: GitHub login of the user who triggered Copilot

origin_requested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the originating request

duration_minutes.description: Minutes from originating request to PR merge/close (null if still open or no origin timestamp)

requests.grain: one row per Copilot invocation event (issue assignment or @copilot mention)
requests.description: Every event where a human invoked Copilot Coding Agent, either by assigning Copilot to an issue or by @mentioning Copilot in an issue/PR comment.

requested_by_login.description: GitHub login of the invoking user

issue_number.description: Issue or PR number where the invocation occurred

issue_id.description: GitHub numeric issue ID (null for PR-side mentions)

issue_node_id.description: GitHub GraphQL node ID of the issue

issue_title.description: Title of the issue or PR

issue_state.description: State of the issue or PR at query time

issue_url.description: HTML URL of the issue or PR

is_pull_request.description: true if the invocation was on a pull request, false if on an issue

pr_number.description: PR number if is_pull_request, null otherwise

comment_id.description: Comment ID for comment_mention requests, null for issue_assignment

comment_body_excerpt.description: First 180 chars of the comment body (null for issue_assignment)

linked_pr_number.description: PR number linked to this request (set during Step 4 linking)

developer_day_summary.grain: one row per developer per day
developer_day_summary.description: Aggregated daily metrics per developer, merging request event counts with PR session lifecycle data. Full outer join on date+developer.

developer.description: GitHub login of the developer who invoked Copilot

issue_assignment_requests.description: Count of issue_assignment requests by this developer on this day

pr_followup_requests.description: Count of @copilot comment_mention requests on pull requests by this developer on this day

total_agent_requests.description: Total request events (issue_assignment + all comment_mention) by this developer on this day

sessions_started.description: Count of distinct copilot-session issues linked to PRs originated by this developer on this day

agent_prs_created.description: Count of Copilot-authored PRs originated by this developer on this day

agent_prs_merged.description: Count of those PRs that were merged

agent_loc_added.description: Total lines of code added across all agent PRs originated by this developer on this day

agent_loc_deleted.description: Total lines of code deleted across all agent PRs originated by this developer on this day

agent_session_minutes.description: Sum of duration_minutes across all agent PRs with known duration for this developer on this day

changes_requested_total.description: Total changes_requested review events across all agent PRs for this developer on this day

median_merge_minutes.description: Median duration_minutes of merged agent PRs for this developer on this day (null if no merged PRs with duration)
